output.code: import json, re, os, textwrap, math, itertools, unicodedata, difflib, sys, statistics

# Load the two files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)[:5]  # Let's peek small subset first

len_quran = len(quran_data)
len_hadith = len(hadith_data)
len_quran, type(quran_data), type(hadith_data)[:0]

full_span = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلًا مِن قَبْلِكَ مِنْهُم مَنْ قَصَصْنَا عَلَيْكَ وَمِنْهُم مَنْ لَمْ نَقْصُصْ عَلَيْكَ وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ أَسْمَاعًا وَأَعْيُنًا وَقُلُوبًا لَعَلَّهُمْ يَصْطَفُونَ وَمَا كُنَّا مُعَذِّبِينَ حَتَّى نَبْعَثَ رَسُولًا"
len(full_span)

import re
import unicodedata

AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"
ALEF_VARIANTS = str.maketrans({
    'أ': 'ا',
    'إ': 'ا',
    'آ': 'ا',
    'ى': 'ي',
    'ؤ': 'و',
    'ئ': 'ي',
    'ة': 'ه',
})
PUNCTUATION = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]")

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    s = s.translate(ALEF_VARIANTS)
    s = PUNCTUATION.sub(" ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

norm_full = normalize_ar(full_span)
norm_full[:200], len(norm_full)

# Search for verses containing some key phrases:
key1 = "ولقد ارسلنا رسلا من قبلك منهم من قصصنا عليك"
key2 = "وما كنا معذبين حتى نبعث رسولا"
key3 = "وجعلنا لهم اسماعا وابصارا وافئدة"
key4 = "وجعلنا لهم اسماعا واعينا وقلوبا"

def search_quran_substring(query):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    matches = []
    for v in quran_data:
        text = v['ayah_text']
        ntext = normalize_ar(text)
        if nq in ntext:
            matches.append((v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['surah_name'], text))
    return matches

m1 = search_quran_substring(key1)
m2 = search_quran_substring(key2)
m3 = search_quran_substring(key3)
m4 = search_quran_substring(key4)
len(m1), len(m2), len(m3), len(m4), m1[:3], m2[:3], m3[:3], m4[:3]

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # DP for LCS length; but strings may be long; use tokens to be faster
    # We'll compute on whitespace-separated tokens to be more semantic
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    n, m = len(ta), len(tb)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if ta[i-1] == tb[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    # normalized LCS over max length
    a = normalize_ar(a)
    b = normalize_ar(b)
    lcs = lcs_length(a, b)
    denom = max(len(a.split()), len(b.split()), 1)
    return lcs / denom

# Compute similarity between full_span and candidate combos
full_norm = normalize_ar(full_span)
full_norm, len(full_norm.split())

ghafir78 = m1[0][3]
isra15 = m2[0][3]
ahqaf26 = search_quran_substring("وجعلنا لهم سمعا وابصارا وافئدة")[0][3]
ghafir78, isra15, ahqaf26[:120]

cand1 = ghafir78
cand2 = ghafir78 + " " + isra15
cand3 = ghafir78 + " " + ahqaf26 + " " + isra15

for i, c in enumerate([cand1, cand2, cand3], start=1):
    r = sim_ratio(full_span, c)
    print(i, r, len(normalize_ar(c).split()), normalize_ar(c)[:120])

# Compute max similarity with any single ayah
def best_single_ayah_match(query):
    nq = normalize_ar(query)
    best = None
    for v in quran_data:
        text = v['ayah_text']
        r = sim_ratio(nq, text)
        if best is None or r > best[0]:
            best = (r, v)
    return best

best_ratio, best_v = best_single_ayah_match(full_span)
best_ratio, best_v['surah_name'], best_v['ayah_id'], best_v['ayah_text'][:120]

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)
len(hadith_data), hadith_data[0].keys()
